title: poa angustifolia f. humilis
intro: Poa angustifolia f. humilis, also known as the narrow-leaved bluegrass or low-growing bluegrass, is a subspecies of the Poa angustifolia plant, a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Poa angustifolia f. humilis include its potential to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. Traditionally, the plant has been used to make herbal preparations such as teas and infusions, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
